summary: See clues file for full details. 2 tossups, 9 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 2 tossups and 9 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: This artist painted a receding row of opened tombs at the bottom center of a Last Judgment that was made as the backing for a priest's chair.
examples: This artist painted a receding row of opened tombs at the bottom center of a Last Judgment that was made as the backing for a priest's chair.

clues.clue: An early Deposition by this artist divides its background landscape into three sections corresponding to the three Gothic arches of its frame.
examples: An early Deposition by this artist divides its background landscape into three sections corresponding to the three Gothic arches of its frame.

clues.clue: This artist's Annalena Altarpiece is often considered the first sacra conversazione.
examples: This artist's Annalena Altarpiece is often considered the first sacra conversazione.

clues.clue: This artist painted a series of frescoes for a complex rebuilt by Michelozzo di Bartolomeo, including a Crucifixion above a set of portrait medallions of famous (*) Dominican friars.
examples: This artist painted a series of frescoes for a complex rebuilt by Michelozzo di Bartolomeo, including a Crucifixion above a set of portrait medallions of famous (*) Dominican friars.

clues.clue: An altarpiece by this man depicts Saints Cosmas and Damian kneeling on a rug whose foreshortening reflects the influence of his younger contemporary Masaccio.
examples: An altarpiece by this man depicts Saints Cosmas and Damian kneeling on a rug whose foreshortening reflects the influence of his younger contemporary Masaccio.

clues.clue: This artist painted frescoes for each cell in a complex whose entrance staircase leads up to his most famous Annunciation.
examples: This artist painted frescoes for each cell in a complex whose entrance staircase leads up to his most famous Annunciation.

clues.clue: This artist included text from the Creation as part of the outer ring, and text from the Gospel of John as part of the inner ring, in his circular painting The Vision of Ezekiel.
examples: This artist included text from the Creation as part of the outer ring, and text from the Gospel of John as part of the inner ring, in his circular painting The Vision of Ezekiel.

clues.clue: His depiction of the life of Christ includes a mockery scene in which a disembodied hand uses a stick to brutalize a blindfolded Jesus.
examples: His depiction of the life of Christ includes a mockery scene in which a disembodied hand uses a stick to brutalize a blindfolded Jesus.

clues.clue: He collaborated with Luca Signorelli and his own student Benozzo Gozzoli to paint frescoes depicting the Judgment Day, in a cathedral in Umbria.
examples: He collaborated with Luca Signorelli and his own student Benozzo Gozzoli to paint frescoes depicting the Judgment Day, in a cathedral in Umbria.

clues.clue: He created an altarpiece with nine predella panels depicting stories of Cosmas and Damian, whose central scene is a sacra conversazione that includes numerous saints standing on an Anatolian carpet behind a pax tablet depicting the crucifixion.
examples: He created an altarpiece with nine predella panels depicting stories of Cosmas and Damian, whose central scene is a sacra conversazione that includes numerous saints standing on an Anatolian carpet behind a pax tablet depicting the crucifixion.

clues.clue: He worked on the Orvieto Cathedral, and showed golden rays emanating from the hands of God hitting the Virgin Mary in one of his versions of the Annunciation, which takes place in an open building with blue pendentives.
examples: He worked on the Orvieto Cathedral, and showed golden rays emanating from the hands of God hitting the Virgin Mary in one of his versions of the Annunciation, which takes place in an open building with blue pendentives.
